subcodes.title: Words to Helen Goodall and Ella Cooper spoken in Jan. 1908
subcodes.first_line: Any movement that is for the benefit of mankind should be joined by the Bahá'ís. If they are not asked to help, they should offer their services
subcodes.subjects: @charitable associations; humanitarian activities, @universality of the Cause, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world
